---
title: "ECiP Speakers & Talks"
format:
  html:
    theme:
      - cosmo
      - brand
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
---

# ECiP Speakers & Talks (2025–2010)

The **Evolutionary Computation in Practice (ECiP)** track at GECCO bridges the gap between theoretical research and industrial application. Below is a historical archive of the track's chairs, organizers, and invited speakers.

## 2025

::: {.speaker-grid}

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Thomas Bartz-Beielstein</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Richard Schulz</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

:::

## 2024

Organizers: Thomas Bartz-Beielstein, Richard Schulz, Danial Yazdani. 

::: {.speaker-grid}

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Thomas Bartz-Beielstein</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Richard Schulz</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Danial Yazdani</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">University of Technology Sydney, Australia</span>
:::

:::

## 2023–2021

Organizers for these years included Thomas Bartz-Beielstein, Bogdan Filipic, Richard Schulz, and Sowmya Chandrasekaran. 

::: {.speaker-grid}

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Thomas Bartz-Beielstein</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">IDE+A, TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Bogdan Filipic</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">Jozef Stefan Institute, Slovenia</span>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Sowmya Chandrasekaran</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">TH Köln, Germany</span>
:::

:::

## 2016

::: {.speaker-grid}

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Thomas Bartz-Beielstein</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">TH Köln, Germany</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Surrogate Model-based Optimization in Practice” </div>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Maizura Mokhtar et al.</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">Cranfield University / Tata Steel</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Optimising a Waste Heat Recovery System using MOEA” </div>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Bogdan Filipic</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">Jozef Stefan Institute, Slovenia</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Challenges of Deploying EC in Steel Industry” </div>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Carlos A. Coello Coello</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">CINVESTAV-IPN, Mexico</span>
<div class="talk-info">“EMO in Real-World Applications” </div>
:::

:::

## 2010

::: {.speaker-grid}

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Michael Affenzeller</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">UAS Upper Austria</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Heuristic Optimization in Production and Logistics” </div>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Thomas Bäck</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">Leiden University / divis</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Intelligent Industry Solutions” </div>
:::

::: {.speaker-card}
<span class="speaker-name">Erik Goodman</span>
<span class="speaker-affil">Michigan State University</span>
<div class="talk-info">“Introducing Academic EC Tech to Industry” </div>
:::

:::

## Archives & References

- [GECCO 2015](https://gecco-2015.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2014](https://gecco-2014.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2013](https://gecco-2013.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2012](https://gecco-2012.sigevo.org/)
- [GECCO 2011](https://gecco-2011.sigevo.org/)

For detailed abstracts, see the official ECiP pages.
